[1621000] Disclosure of Notes to the financial statements - Trade Receivables - General Industry
Pengungkapan Disclosure
31 March 2026
Pengungkapan Disclosure
Pengungkapan catatan atas piutang usaha Pada tanggal 31 Maret 2026 dan 31 Desember 2025, piutang usaha tertentu digunakan sebagai Disclosure of notes for trade
jaminan atas fasilitas pinjaman utang bank jangka pendek yang diperoleh dari NSP dan BSP, entitas receivables
anak, dari PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (Catatan 19). As of March 31, 2026 and December 31, 2025,
certain trade receivables are used as collateral for short-term bank loans facilities obtained by NSP and
BSP, subsidiaries, from PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (Note 19). Piutang usaha tidak dikenakan
bunga. Trade receivables are non-interest bearing. Lihat Catatan 33 mengenai risiko kredit piutang
usaha untuk memahami bagaimana Grup mengelola dan mengukur kualitas kredit piutang usaha. See
Note 33 on credit risk of trade receivables to understand how the Group manages and measured credit
quality of trade receivables. Manajemen Grup berpendapat seluruh piutang usaha tersebut dapat
tertagih sehingga tidak perlu dibentuk penyisihan kerugian penurunan nilai. The Group management is
of the opinion that all trade receivables are fully collectible and therefore no allowance for impairment
losses have been provided.
